chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2121 of 2023 Sami Pharmaceutical (Pvt.) Ltd. Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of Misc. No.10260/23 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 04.10.2024 Mr. Mamoon N. Chaudhry for petitioner. None for respondents. -.-.- Mr. Mamoon Chaudhry, learned counsel appearing for petitioner, on instructions, does not press this petition which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Chief Justice Judge
